heading: Use of Special Defense Acquisition Fund
label: 3354 Use of Special Defense Acquisition Fund
text: The Secretary of Defense, in consultation with the Secretary of State, shall seek to utilize the Special Defense Acquisition Fund established under chapter 5 of the Arms Export Control Act ( et seq.) to expedite the procurement and delivery of defense articles and defense services for the purpose of assisting and supporting the armed forces of Taiwan.22 U.S.C. 2795
notes: References in TextThe Arms Export Control Act, referred to in text, is , , . Chapter 5 of the Act is classified generally to subchapter V (§ 2795 et seq.) of chapter 39 of this title. For complete classification of this Act to the Code, see Short Title note set out under and Tables.Pub. L. 90–62982 Stat. 1320section 2751 of this titleOct. 22, 1968
